tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service. Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS. 4 miles of offset bus lanes with bus bulb stations.

payload.description: Conversion of Bx41 Limited to Bx41 Select Bus Service on Webster Avenue, from The Hub to Williamsbridge, with offset bus lanes, bus bulbs, off-board fare collection, transit signal priority, and pedestrian safety improvements.

payload.description: Webster Avenue corridor from The Hub to Williamsbridge, serving the Bx41 route with over 20,000 daily riders.

tool_args.label: Bx41 SBS
tool_args.raw_text: Bx41 LTD → Bx41 SBS | Service will run frequently all day | 1/2 mile stop spacing

payload.description: Select Bus Service on Webster Avenue, replacing Bx41 Limited. Frequent all-day service with 1/2 mile stop spacing and off-board fare collection.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Local
tool_args.raw_text: Bx41 Local - No change to stop spacing - Service every ~10 minutes

payload.description: Bx41 Local bus service on Webster Avenue. No change to stop spacing. Service every ~10 minutes.

tool_args.label: Bx15 Local
tool_args.raw_text: Bx15 Local - Local stops: The Hub ↔ Fordham Plaza

payload.description: Third Avenue local bus service from The Hub to Fordham Plaza.

tool_args.label: Bx15 LTD
tool_args.raw_text: Bx15 LTD - Local stops: Harlem 125th St ↔ The Hub - Limited stops: The Hub ↔ Fordham Plaza

payload.description: Bx15 Limited service: local stops Harlem 125th Street to The Hub, limited stops The Hub to Fordham Plaza.

tool_args.label: Bx41 LTD (existing, to be replaced)
tool_args.raw_text: Existing bus services: Bx41 LTD, Bx41 Local, Bx55 (Limited) north of Fordham Plaza

payload.description: Existing Bx41 Limited service on Webster Avenue, to be replaced by Bx41 SBS.

tool_args.label: Bx55 Limited
tool_args.raw_text: Existing bus services: Bx55 (Limited) north of Fordham Plaza | Third Avenue: Bx55 (Limited)

payload.description: Existing Bx55 Limited service north of Fordham Plaza on Webster Avenue and Third Avenue.

tool_args.label: SBS to LaGuardia Airport
tool_args.raw_text: Proposed bus services - Webster Avenue: Bx41 SBS, Bx41 Local, SBS to LaGuardia Airport

payload.description: Proposed SBS service to LaGuardia Airport, noted as part of Webster Avenue route planning.

tool_args.label: Offset Bus Lanes on Webster Avenue
tool_args.raw_text: 4 miles of offset bus lanes with bus bulb stations

payload.location_text: Webster Avenue, The Hub to Williamsbridge
payload.description: 4 miles of offset bus lanes on Webster Avenue, replacing one general travel lane with a bus lane in each direction.

normalized_location.raw_text: Webster Avenue, The Hub to Williamsbridge

tool_args.label: Off-Board Fare Collection
tool_args.raw_text: Off-board fare collection (like the Bx12 SBS on Fordham Road)

payload.description: Off-board fare collection with MetroCard machines and coin machines on the sidewalk. Proof of payment receipt required. Enforced by NYCT inspectors with $100 fine.

tool_args.label: Bus Bulb Stations
tool_args.raw_text: 4 miles of offset bus lanes with bus bulb stations. Bus bulbs allow for high-quality SBS stations.

payload.description: Bus bulb stations at SBS stops for high-quality stations. 2013: SBS stations at existing LTD stop locations with temporary paint treatments. 2014-2015: permanent bus bulbs built in concrete.

tool_args.label: Transit Signal Priority
tool_args.raw_text: Transit signal priority for the entire route

payload.description: Transit signal priority for the Bx41 SBS route along Webster Avenue.

tool_args.label: Pedestrian Safety Improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Pedestrian safety improvements: neckdowns, curb extensions, pedestrian refuge islands, medians

payload.location_text: Webster Avenue corridor, especially at E Tremont Ave, E Fordham Rd, and Cross Bronx Expressway
payload.description: Pedestrian safety improvements including curb extensions/neckdowns, pedestrian refuge islands, medians, new signalized pedestrian crossings, and pedestrian areas with paint treatments in 2013 and concrete in 2014-2015.

normalized_location.raw_text: Webster Avenue corridor, especially at E Tremont Ave, E Fordham Rd, and Cross Bronx Expressway

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS Start of Service - June 2013
tool_args.raw_text: June: Install fare machines, Bus stop changes, Selected curb regulation changes, Start of Service at the end of the month

payload.description: Start of Service for Webster Avenue SBS at the end of June 2013, after installing fare machines, bus stop changes, and curb regulation changes.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS Roadway Work - Late March to May 2013
tool_args.raw_text: Late March – May: Milling & Paving, Lane markings, Red bus lane paint, Selected pedestrian islands / medians

payload.description: Roadway markings and transit service implementation work: milling and paving, lane markings, red bus lane paint, selected pedestrian islands/medians.
